title: pyrus koehneana
intro: Pyrus koehneana, also known as the Chinese wild pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pyrus koehneana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
